creator: taosecurity@gmail.com
text:
FreeBSD 7.2 correctly finds da0: 

da0 at twa0 bus 0 target 0 lun 0
da0: <AMCC 9550SX-4LP DISK 3.04> Fixed Direct Access SCSI-3 device 
da0: 100.000MB/s transfers
da0: 610308MB (1249910784 512 byte sectors: 255H 63S/T 77803C)

FreeBSD 8.0-BETA3 doesn't see da0 unless I enable 

hw.pci.mcfg=0

in /boot/loader.conf.  When I boot using hw.pci.mcfg=0 I see:

da0 at twa0 bus 0 target 0 lun 0
da0: <AMCC 9550SX-4LP DISK 3.04> Fixed Direct Access SCSI-3 device 
da0: 100.000MB/s transfers
da0: 610308MB (1249910784 512 byte sectors: 255H 63S/T 77803C)

as expected.

Fix: 

Enable 

hw.pci.mcfg=0

in /boot/loader.conf on 8.0-BETA4.

This appears related to PRs 128686, 132372, and 137942.  

I will test amd64 next to see if I can reproduce the problem and solution.
